title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Questions on global priorities and the future of the human race.

questions.question: Is it right to spend billions on space when there is still poverty on Earth?
Do you think humans will eventually live on other planets?

script.text: If you had the chance to go on a one-way trip to Mars, would you take it?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
